code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut token = ""
    mut index = 0
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if not string.is_empty(token)
            if index % 2 == 0
              if string.is_empty(out)
                out = token
              else
                out = "#{out} #{token}"
              end
            end
            index = index + 1
            token = ""
          end
        else
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      if index % 2 == 0
        if string.is_empty(out)
          out = token
        else
          out = "#{out} #{token}"
        end
      end
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
